items.scenario: You are a senior majoring in environmental science applying to several graduate programs this fall. You took two courses with Professor Whitfield during your junior year, and you would like her to write a letter of recommendation supporting your application before the November deadline.
items.direction: Write an email to Professor Whitfield. In your email, do the following:
goals: Thank her for her past mentorship
Describe the programs you are applying to
Ask whether she would be willing to write the letter
items.subject: Request for a recommendation letter for graduate applications

items.scenario: You are a part-time assistant at a campus events office where your manager recently introduced new scheduling software. After using it for a month, you have noticed both useful features and recurring frustrations that affect your weekly workload and the way student volunteers sign up.
items.direction: Write an email to Mr. Carter. In your email, do the following:
goals: Describe one feature that has worked well for you
Explain a recurring problem you have encountered
Suggest a change that could improve your workflow
items.subject: Initial feedback on the new scheduling software

items.scenario: You are a regular visitor at the Eastside community library, which currently closes at one o'clock on Sundays. Several patrons in your weekend reading group, including older neighbors without weekday availability, have mentioned that the early closing time makes it difficult to use the library together.
items.direction: Write an email to Ms. Davenport. In your email, do the following:
goals: Explain why the current Sunday hours feel restrictive
Suggest a specific extension of the schedule
Offer to gather support from other regular patrons
items.subject: Suggestion to extend the community library's Sunday hours

items.scenario: You recently bought a commuter bicycle online from PedalForward Bicycles, but after only two weeks of normal use the rear brake has stopped responding properly. The bike is still under the manufacturer's six-month warranty, and you cannot safely ride it to campus.
items.direction: Write an email to Customer Service, PedalForward Bicycles. In your email, do the following:
goals: Describe the brake problem in detail
Request a replacement or full refund under the warranty
Ask how to return the defective bicycle
items.subject: Defective rear brake on recently purchased commuter bicycle
